positive: Minimalist silhouette of a majestic mountain range with a full moon rising over the peaks. The sky is a deep indigo gradient blending into soft amethyst tones near the horizon. Foreground elements include stylized pine trees and abstract wisps of clouds, designed with clean, scalable vectors for t-shirt printing. Use strong, graphic contrast between the dark silhouettes and the luminous sky, evoking a sense of peaceful grandeur and adventure. Graphic design style, flat vector art aesthetic, centered composition, highly symmetrical, vibrant color palette limited to indigo, amethyst, deep navy, and silver-white, suitable for screen printing, high detail, smooth lines, isolated elements, no gradients on the primary shapes.
